BackstoryDef.title: JOY scientist
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was hired by their urbworld's military chemical division to create a drug for soldiers on the frontline of war. [PAWN_nameDef] is one of the leading scientists on the JOY project. JOY is a drug that would make anyone who took it feel nothing, both physically AND emotionally, usually being shipped out to divisions of soldiers on extended frontline deployment. [PAWN_nameDef] was unaware of the horrible side effects of [PAWN_possessive] recipe, and once discovered, they vowed off of medicine and destroyed all research releated to the JOY project.
